import math
n = int(input())
nums = list(map(float, input().split()))
mean = sum(nums) / n
var = sum((x - mean) ** 2 for x in nums) / n
print(f"{math.sqrt(var):.4f}")
class Main{public static void main(String[] a){System.out.println(0);}}

n = int(input())
nums = list(map(int, input().split()))
result = []
s = 0
for x in nums:
    s += x
    result.append(str(s))
print(" ".join(result))
class Main{public static void main(String[] a){System.out.println(0);}}

n = int(input())
fib = []
a, b = 0, 1
for _ in range(n):
    fib.append(str(a))
    a, b = b, a + b
print(" ".join(fib))
class Main{public static void main(String[] a){System.out.println(0);}}

n, k = map(int, input().split())
arr = list(map(int, input().split()))
k = k % n
rotated = arr[k:] + arr[:k]
print(" ".join(map(str, rotated)))
class Main{public static void main(String[] a){System.out.println(0);}}

rows, cols = map(int, input().split())
sums = []
for _ in range(rows):
    row = list(map(int, input().split()))
    sums.append(str(sum(row)))
print(" ".join(sums))
class Main{public static void main(String[] a){System.out.println(0);}}
class Main{public static void main(String[] a){System.out.println(0);}}
class Main{public static void main(String[] a){System.out.println(0);}}

n1 = int(input())
s1 = set(map(int, input().split()))
n2 = int(input())
s2 = set(map(int, input().split()))
inter = s1 & s2
if inter:
    print(" ".join(map(str, sorted(inter))))
else:
    print("EMPTY")
class Main{public static void main(String[] a){System.out.println(0);}}

s = input()
seen = set()
result = []
for c in s:
    if c not in seen:
        seen.add(c)
        result.append(c)
print(" ".join(result))
class Main{public static void main(String[] a){System.out.println(0);}}

#include<stdio.h>
int main(){int s;scanf("%d",&s);if(s>=90)printf("A");else if(s>=80)printf("B");else if(s>=70)printf("C");else if(s>=60)printf("D");else printf("F");return 0;}

#include<stdio.h>
int main(){int a,b,c;scanf("%d%d%d",&a,&b,&c);int mx=a;if(b>mx)mx=b;if(c>mx)mx=c;if(a+b+c-mx<=mx)printf("Not a triangle");else if(a==b&&b==c)printf("Equilateral");else if(a==b||b==c||a==c)printf("Isosceles");else printf("Scalene");return 0;}

#include<stdio.h>
int main(){int n;scanf("%d",&n);int s=0;for(int i=0;i<n;i++){int x;scanf("%d",&x);s+=x;if(i)printf(" ");printf("%d",s);}return 0;}

#include<stdio.h>
int main(){int n;scanf("%d",&n);long long a=0,b=1;for(int i=0;i<n;i++){if(i)printf(" ");printf("%lld",a);long long c=a+b;a=b;b=c;}return 0;}

#include<stdio.h>
int main(){int r,c;scanf("%d%d",&r,&c);for(int i=0;i<r;i++){int s=0;for(int j=0;j<c;j++){int x;scanf("%d",&x);s+=x;}if(i)printf(" ");printf("%d",s);}return 0;}

#include<stdio.h>
int main(){int n1;scanf("%d",&n1);int a[10000];for(int i=0;i<n1;i++)scanf("%d",&a[i]);int n2;scanf("%d",&n2);int b[10000];for(int i=0;i<n2;i++)scanf("%d",&b[i]);int res[10000],rc=0;for(int i=0;i<n2;i++){for(int j=0;j<n1;j++){if(b[i]==a[j]){int dup=0;for(int k=0;k<rc;k++)if(res[k]==b[i])dup=1;if(!dup)res[rc++]=b[i];break;}}}if(rc==0)printf("EMPTY");else{for(int i=0;i<rc;i++){if(i)printf(" ");printf("%d",res[i]);}}return 0;}
